MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES; POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATIONS; SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS IN SUPPORT; PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR JAN-16-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMNT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING THE EXISTENCE OF A HAZARDOUS CONDITION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR ON FEB-17-2009. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON APR-10-2009 AT 9:00 AM FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR ORDER AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEPHERD, LORALYN TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
